sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33377" key="e)laiofutei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλαιο-φῠτεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33377.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">planting of olives</tr_>, St.Byz.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φελλεύς</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
